plugins.name: hello-world
plugins.description: Minimal starter plugin demonstrating a slash command and a skill

plugins.name: kcc-core
plugins.description: Core plugin: top-level context injections and shared commands / skills.

plugins.name: kcc-dev-core
plugins.description: Development-focused plugin: conditionally injects code-discipline principles when the session is inside a software project, and hosts shared dev skills / hooks.

plugins.name: kcc-preview
plugins.description: Mirror preview-worthy content from a Claude Code session to a local browser UI with a session-scoped index.
